basic_details.short_information: Adjudicatory Board for Major Ports (ABMP) Recruitment 2026: Adjudicatory Board for Major Ports has released the official notification for 5 Consultant (IT), Consultant (Registry), Consultant (Sr. PPS/PPS/PS) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Across India. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 64 years of age as on the closing date of receipt of applications. Engagement shall not extend beyond the age of 65 years.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications. Engagement shall not extend beyond the age of 65 years. No age relaxation is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, B.Tech/B.E., M.Tech/Masters in Computer Science/Application/IT, M.Sc in Computer Science/IT, Degree in Law (minimum 50% marks), High proficiency in stenography (100 wpm) and excellent noting/drafting skills.
qualification.details: Consultant (IT): M.Tech / Masters Degree in Computer Science / Computer Application / Information Technology or M.Sc in Computer Science / Information Technology or B.E. / B.Tech in Computer Science / Information Technology from a recognized University / Institute with a minimum of 10 years of experience in Information Technology systems, including e-Governance platforms, digital case management systems, e-Office implementation, cyber security frameworks and data management, preferably in High Courts, District Courts, Tribunals, quasi-judicial bodies or Government. Consultant (Registry): Degree in Law (including an Integrated Degree Course in Law under 10+2+3+3 or 10+2+5 pattern) with a minimum aggregate of 50% marks from any School/College/University/Institute established by law in India and recognized by the Bar Council of India for admission as Advocate or Attorney of an Indian Court, with a minimum of 10 years of experience in registry functions of High Courts, District Courts, Tribunals or quasi-judicial bodies and having performed duties analogous to those discharged in judicial registries, including scrutiny of application, diarisation, registration of cases, preparation of cause lists, maintenance and custody of records, issuance of notices/orders and ensuring procedural compliance in quasi-judicial proceedings. Consultant (Sr. PPS/PPS/PS): High proficiency in stenography (minimum speed of 100 words per minute) and excellent noting and drafting skills. Minimum of 15 years experience for engagement as Sr. PPS and a minimum of 10 years experience for engagement as PPS/PS. Experience of having worked with Senior Officers in the High Courts, District Courts, Tribunals, Central Government, State Governments, Autonomous Bodies, Statutory Authorities, or Public Sector Undertakings.

salary_details.details: Remuneration = Last Pay Drawn – Basic Pension. No increment or additional financial benefit shall accrue during the tenure of engagement.

selection_process: Applications submitted online Eligible Candidates may be asked to appear for viva voce Selection process shall be conducted by the Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ABMP to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.adjudicatory_board_for_major_ports_abmp: Graduate, B.Tech/B.E., M.Tech/Masters in Computer Science/Application/IT, M.Sc in Computer Science/IT, Degree in Law (minimum 50% marks), High proficiency in stenography (100 wpm) and excellent noting/drafting skills.
Not more than 64 years of age as on the closing date of receipt of applications. Engagement shall not extend beyond the age of 65 years.

content_sections.heading: ABMP Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ABMP Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ABMP Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ABMP Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Consultant (IT): M.Tech / Masters Degree in Computer Science / Computer Application / Information Technology or M.Sc in Computer Science / Information Technology or B.E. / B.Tech in Computer Science / Information Technology from a recognized University / Institute with a minimum of 10 years of experience in Information Technology systems, including e-Governance platforms, digital case management systems, e-Office implementation, cyber security frameworks and data management, preferably in High Courts, District Courts, Tribunals, quasi-judicial bodies or Government. Consultant (Registry): Degree in Law (including an Integrated Degree Course in Law under 10+2+3+3 or 10+2+5 pattern) with a minimum aggregate of 50% marks from any School/College/University/Institute established by law in India and recognized by the Bar Council of India for admission as Advocate or Attorney of an Indian Court, with a minimum of 10 years of experience in registry functions of High Courts, District Courts, Tribunals or quasi-judicial bodies and having performed duties analogous to those discharged in judicial registries, including scrutiny of application, diarisation, registration of cases, preparation of cause lists, maintenance and custody of records, issuance of notices/orders and ensuring procedural compliance in quasi-judicial proceedings. Consultant (Sr. PPS/PPS/PS): High proficiency in stenography (minimum speed of 100 words per minute) and excellent noting and drafting skills. Minimum of 15 years experience for engagement as Sr. PPS and a minimum of 10 years experience for engagement as PPS/PS. Experience of having worked with Senior Officers in the High Courts, District Courts, Tribunals, Central Government, State Governments, Autonomous Bodies, Statutory Authorities, or Public Sector Undertakings.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ABMP Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications. Engagement shall not extend beyond the age of 65 years. No age relaxation is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ABMP Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Remuneration = Last Pay Drawn – Basic Pension. No increment or additional financial benefit shall accrue during the tenure of engagement.

rows.event: Last date for submission of applications

content_sections.heading: ABMP Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Applications submitted online Eligible Candidates may be asked to appear for viva voce Selection process shall be conducted by the Selection Committee

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ABMP to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ABMP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the ABMP Recruitment 2026 is 24th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the ABMP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the posts of Consultant (IT), Consultant (Registry), and Consultant (Sr. PPS/PPS/PS) in the Adjudicatory Board for Major Ports.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (IT) post?
faq.answer: For the Consultant (IT) post, candidates need to have a M.Tech / Masters Degree in Computer Science / Computer Application / Information Technology or M.Sc in Computer Science / Information Technology or B.E. / B.Tech in Computer Science / Information Technology from a recognized University / Institute.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the ABMP Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Consultant posts is 64 years as on the closing date of application receipt. The engagement will not extend beyond the age of 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The remuneration for the selected candidates will be calculated as 'Last Pay Drawn minus Basic Pension'. No additional increments or financial benefits will be provided during the contract period.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for the ABMP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for the ABMP Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online through the official website of ABMP.

faq.question: Q7. What is the experience required for the Consultant (Registry) post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Consultant (Registry) post must have a minimum of 10 years of experience in registry functions of High Courts, District Courts, Tribunals, or quasi-judicial bodies.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the ABMP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the ABMP Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these consultant positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the submission of online applications. Eligible candidates may be called for a viva voce, and the selection will be conducted by a Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can also visit the official website of ABMP for more details.
